changes.comment: Antagonist torture tests for the ai-assist provider-shape, model-routing, convert/validate-symmetry, and param-rejection near-miss classes, plus one production fix they surfaced: executeClientToolTurn now fails fast with a clear message when a Gemini turn combines a web_search server tool with client (function) tools — Gemini's generateContent API HTTP-400s on that combination, so the guard converts an opaque wire 400 into an actionable pre-flight failure. Other providers are unaffected.
